title: jj (Jujutsu) VCS Support Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan for adding Jujutsu VCS support with new jj plugin, VCS-aware pr-review skills/agents, and workspace hooks.
notes: Classified as DOC (supporting context/implementation planning) rather than ADR/PRD/SPEC. Document provides goal, architecture, tech stack, and 12 procedural tasks for implementation. Medium confidence because implementation plans are not explicitly defined in taxonomy but closest fit is DOC (design rationale + procedural guidance similar to runbooks).
